additional_steps.name: MIUI 优化检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as optimization_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*MIUI*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*miui*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*MiBoost*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Boost*Pool*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.description: 检查云控和推送服务对启动的影响
additional_steps.name: 小米云服务检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as service_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  t.name as thread_name
FROM slice s
JOIN thread_track tt ON s.track_id = tt.id
JOIN thread t ON tt.utid = t.utid
JOIN process p ON t.upid = p.upid
WHERE p.name GLOB '${package}*'
  AND (s.name GLOB '*MiPush*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*XMPush*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Analytics*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*cloud*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.dur > 1000000
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: 内存优化状态
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as memory_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*lmk*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*memory*reclaim*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*compaction*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

meta.description: 针对小米 MIUI/HyperOS 优化的启动分析
meta.display_name: 小米 MIUI 启动分析
